---

title: "D02_05: Master Execution Flow"
subtitle: "Complete D02 execution orchestration"
parent: "D02_filtered_customer_views"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D02_05"
date-created: "2025-12-24"
date-modified: "2025-12-24"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D02_00_grid_initialization"
  - "D02_01_condition_grid"
  - "D02_02_filtered_sales_views"
  - "D02_03_customer_views"
  - "D02_04_dna_integration"
outputs_to:
  - "execution_result"
implements:
  - "DM_R044": "Derivation Implementation Standard"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D02_05: Master Execution Flow {#overview}

This task orchestrates the complete D02 derivation pipeline, coordinating all subtasks and managing the execution flow for customer view filtering.

## Complete Execution Flow (NSQL) {#complete-execution}

```nsql
# D02 Complete Execution Flow
EXECUTE D02_complete:
  CONTEXT:
    start_time: CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    derivation_name: "D02_Customer_View_Filtering"

  # Verify prerequisites
  PREREQUISITE:
    ASSERT D01.success = TRUE
    ELSE: ABORT "D02 requires successful D01 execution"

  # Execute steps in sequence
  SEQUENCE:
    STEP 1: D02_00_create_schema
      ON_SUCCESS: LOG "Filtered schema created"
      ON_FAILURE: ABORT "Failed to create schema"

    STEP 2: D02_01_create_condition_grid
      ON_SUCCESS: LOG "Condition grid created: {grid_count} combinations"
      ON_FAILURE: ABORT "Failed to create condition grid"

    STEP 3: D02_02_create_filtered_sales_views
      ON_SUCCESS: LOG "Filtered sales views created: {view_count} views"
      ON_FAILURE: ABORT "Failed to create sales views"

    STEP 4: D02_03_create_customer_views
      ON_SUCCESS: LOG "Customer-centric views created: {customer_view_count} views"
      ON_FAILURE: ABORT "Failed to create customer views"

    STEP 5: D02_04_integrate_dna
      ON_SUCCESS: LOG "DNA integration complete: {complete_view_count} views"
      ON_FAILURE: ABORT "Failed to integrate DNA profiles"

    STEP 6: D02_validate_success
      ON_SUCCESS: LOG "All success criteria validated"
      ON_FAILURE: WARNING "Some validation checks failed"

  # Calculate execution metrics
  FINALIZE:
    execution_time: DATEDIFF(seconds, start_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
    total_views_created: COUNT(views) IN processed_data.filtered
    condition_combinations: COUNT(condition_grids)

  RETURN:
    success: TRUE
    derivation_name: derivation_name
    views_created: total_views_created
    condition_combinations: condition_combinations
    execution_time_secs: execution_time
```

## Execution Sequence Diagram

```
┌─────────────────┐
│ D01 DNA Analysis│
│  (prerequisite) │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│   D02_00        │
│ Create Schema   │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│   D02_01        │
│ Condition Grid  │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│   D02_02        │
│ Sales Views     │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│   D02_03        │
│ Customer Views  │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│   D02_04        │
│ DNA Integration │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ Execution Result│
└─────────────────┘
```

## Five-Part Structure Compliance (DM_R044) {#five-part}

Each implementation script MUST follow the five-part execution structure:

| Part | Purpose | Key Elements |
|------|---------|--------------|
| **PART 1: INITIALIZE** | Setup environment | `autoinit()`, database connection, config loading |
| **PART 2: MAIN** | Execute D02_00-D02_03 | Core business logic wrapped in `tryCatch()` |
| **PART 3: TEST** | Validate outputs | View existence, schema validation |
| **PART 4: SUMMARIZE** | Report metrics | View count, execution time |
| **PART 5: DEINITIALIZE** | Cleanup | `autodeinit()` (MUST be final statement) |

## Configuration Management (NSQL) {#config-mgmt}

```nsql
# D02 Configuration Management
CONFIGURATION D02_config:
  # Grid component source files
  SOURCES:
    grid_components: "app_data/parameters/list_grid_components.R"
    grid_initializer: "22_initializations/sc_grid_components.R"

  # Runtime configuration
  RUNTIME:
    enable_subset_mode: TRUE  # Allow testing with subset
    default_subset_size: 36   # Reduced grid for testing
    cache_views: TRUE         # Cache query results
    cache_ttl_minutes: 30     # Cache expiration

  # View generation settings
  VIEW_SETTINGS:
    materialization: FALSE    # Virtual views by default
    create_indexes: TRUE      # Index filter columns
    log_creation: TRUE        # Log view creation
```

## Performance Optimization (NSQL) {#performance}

```nsql
# D02 Performance Optimization Patterns
OPTIMIZE D02_performance:
  # Index creation for filter columns
  CREATE_INDEXES:
    INDEX idx_source ON df_sales(source_filter)
    INDEX idx_time ON df_sales(transaction_date)
    INDEX idx_product ON df_sales(product_line_id)
    INDEX idx_state ON df_sales(state)
    COMPOSITE INDEX idx_all_filters ON df_sales(source_filter, product_line_id, state)

  # Materialization for hot views
  MATERIALIZE hot_views:
    CRITERIA:
      access_count >= 100 PER day
      OR is_default_filter = TRUE
    REFRESH: EVERY 1 HOUR

  # Query caching
  CACHE_STRATEGY:
    cache_enabled: TRUE
    cache_size_mb: 512
    eviction_policy: LRU
    ttl_minutes: 30
```

## Success Validation (NSQL) {#validation}

```nsql
# D02 Success Criteria Validation
VALIDATE D02_success:
  # Criterion 1: All condition combinations have views
  CHECK view_coverage:
    expected_views: COUNT(condition_grids) * 2  # Sales + Customer views
    actual_views: COUNT(views) IN processed_data.filtered
    ASSERT actual_views >= expected_views

  # Criterion 2: Views have required columns
  CHECK view_schema:
    FOR EACH view IN processed_data.filtered.df_sales_*:
      ASSERT columns_exist: [customer_id, transaction_date, amount, product_id]
      ASSERT filter_columns_exist: [source_filter, time_condition, product_line_id_filter, state_filter]

  # Criterion 3: Customer aggregation is correct
  CHECK customer_aggregation:
    FOR EACH view IN processed_data.filtered.df_sales_by_customer_*:
      ASSERT is_unique: customer_id
      ASSERT has_metrics: [transaction_count, total_spent, first_purchase_date, last_purchase_date]

  # Criterion 4: Filter conditions are preserved
  CHECK filter_preservation:
    FOR EACH view IN processed_data.filtered.*:
      ASSERT column_not_null: source_filter
      ASSERT column_not_null: time_condition

  # Criterion 5: Query performance is acceptable
  CHECK query_performance:
    FOR SAMPLE views IN processed_data.filtered (LIMIT 10):
      query_time: TIME(SELECT * FROM view LIMIT 1000)
      ASSERT query_time < 1 SECOND

  RETURN validation_report
```

## Execution Result Schema {#result-schema}

| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| `success` | BOOLEAN | Whether execution completed |
| `derivation_name` | VARCHAR | Name identifier |
| `views_created` | INTEGER | Total views created |
| `condition_combinations` | INTEGER | Grid combination count |
| `execution_time_secs` | NUMERIC | Total execution time |

## Related Documentation

- [D02_03_customer_views.qmd](D02_03_customer_views.qmd) - Customer aggregation
- [D02_04_dna_integration.qmd](D02_04_dna_integration.qmd) - DNA integration
- [D02_06_module_consumers.qmd](D02_06_module_consumers.qmd) - Module consumers
- [DM_R044](../../../part1_principles/CH02_data_management/rules/DM_R044_derivation_implementation_standard.qmd) - Implementation standard
